name: multi-field-overlay-curvature
description: Multi-Field scene with curvature overlay enabled. Per-brick |k1|+|k2| (sum of absolute principal curvatures) computed via central differences on the brick's voxels (Goldman 2005 divergence-of-normalized-gradient formula). Bricks colored by a blue → purple gradient; peaks at sharp surface bends. Stage 2 of ADR 0014 — voxel snapshot path B (sparse, ~27 evals per brick).
